description: Add scrum-style user stories, sprint metadata, and velocity tracking to Measure tracks

sprint.goal: Add lightweight scrum-flavored structure to Measure tracks so feature tracks can optionally behave like a sprint: framed by a sprint goal, decomposed into user stories with Gherkin acceptance criteria, sized with T-shirt estimates, and reported with a rolling velocity

stories.title: Optional sprint metadata on feature tracks
Velocity & estimation accuracy in status report
